title: Mods and Fun
description: A Modpack with some nice mods and cool projects. Mostly for fun experiments. It´s my first one.
body:
My first Modpack.
It´s made for fun experiments with weapons and other stuff Includes mods like createfarmer´s Delight and Ars Nouveau.
I recommend the modpack to experiment around and maybe build a small base. In the future I will focus the modpack more on survival gameplay. As soon as there are enough mods for version 1.21 I will update the modpack to newer versions.
However, the modpack is currently not so well for survival.
